feature: Complete dark mode audit ā€” replace all hardcoded colors across 6 files

prompts.description: Fix hardcoded colors in app/globals.css utility classes
prompts.prompt:
In app/globals.css, replace ALL hardcoded color values inside @layer components utility class definitions. Apply these exact changes:

1. .dashboard-day-chip (around line 234):
   Change: `hover:bg-[#fcf7ef] dark:hover:bg-secondary`
   To:     `hover:bg-secondary`

2. .dashboard-detail-panel (around line 250):
   Change: `border-[#e5d7c7] dark:border-border bg-[#f8f2ea] dark:bg-secondary/60`
   To:     `border-border bg-secondary/60`

3. .dashboard-warning (around lines 254-263): Replace the raw CSS properties with @apply and a dark-mode-aware pattern:
   Change the full rule from:
     .dashboard-warning { @apply ...; border-color: rgba(183, 119, 73, 0.28); background: #fff3e6; color: #7a5b41; }
     .dark .dashboard-warning { border-color: var(--border); background: var(--secondary); color: var(--muted-foreground); }
   To:
     .dashboard-warning { @apply rounded-2xl border border-border bg-secondary px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-6 text-muted-foreground; }
   (Remove the .dark .dashboard-warning block entirely ā€” it is no longer needed.)

4. .grocery-item-row (around line 274):
   Change: `hover:bg-[#fcf7ef] dark:hover:bg-secondary`
   To:     `hover:bg-secondary`

5. .grocery-row-marker (around line 286):
   Change: `bg-[#b77749]/70`
   To:     `bg-muted-foreground/70`

6. .settings-section-panel (around line 298):
   Change: `border-[#e5d7c7] bg-[#f8f2ea] p-4 dark:border-border dark:bg-secondary/60`
   To:     `border-border bg-secondary/60 p-4`

7. .settings-choice-card-active (around line 306):
   Change: `bg-[#edf4ec] shadow-[0_16px_30px_-28px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)] dark:bg-primary/15`
   To:     `bg-primary/15 shadow-[0_16px_30px_-28px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)]`

8. .settings-choice-card-idle (around line 310):
   Change: `hover:bg-[#fcf7ef] dark:hover:bg-secondary`
   To:     `hover:bg-secondary`

9. .settings-chip-active (around line 318):
   Change: `bg-[#edf4ec] text-foreground shadow-[0_14px_26px_-24px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)] dark:bg-primary/15`
   To:     `bg-primary/15 text-foreground shadow-[0_14px_26px_-24px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)]`

10. .settings-chip-idle (around line 322):
    Change: `hover:bg-[#fcf7ef] hover:text-foreground dark:hover:bg-secondary`
    To:     `hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground`

Do not change anything else ā€” preserve all other @apply classes, shadows, and the dashboard-header-panel gradient (it is intentional for light mode and already has a .dark override). Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.

In components/grocery-list.tsx, replace ALL hardcoded color values. Apply these exact changes:

1. categoryColors object (around lines 32-39) ā€” replace every hardcoded entry:
   Change:
     protein: "bg-[#eee5da] text-[#7a5b41]",
     vegetables: "bg-[#edf4ec] text-primary",
     carbs: "bg-[#f4efe5] text-[#8b6a45]",
     dairy: "bg-[#edf1f4] text-[#5c7086]",
     fats: "bg-[#f5efe4] text-[#8a704f]",
     fruits: "bg-[#f5e8e0] text-[#a05d43]",
   To:
     protein: "bg-secondary text-muted-foreground",
     vegetables: "bg-primary/15 text-primary",
     carbs: "bg-secondary text-muted-foreground",
     dairy: "bg-secondary text-muted-foreground",
     fats: "bg-secondary text-muted-foreground",
     fruits: "bg-secondary text-muted-foreground",
   (Leave spices unchanged ā€” it already uses bg-muted text-muted-foreground.)

2. Hero badge (around line 104):
   Change: `hero-badge bg-[#fff7ee] text-[#7a5b41]`
   To:     `hero-badge bg-secondary text-muted-foreground`

3. Accent dot (around line 219):
   Change: `bg-[#b77749]`
   To:     `bg-muted-foreground`

Do not change anything else. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.

prompts.description: Fix hardcoded accent dots in settings-screen.tsx
prompts.prompt:
In components/settings-screen.tsx, find and replace ALL instances of the hardcoded accent dot color. There are exactly 3 occurrences (around lines 310, 445, 734):

   Change: `bg-[#b77749]`
   To:     `bg-muted-foreground`

The spans look like: `<span className="h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#b77749]" />` or `<span className="mt-2 h-2 w-2 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-[#b77749]" />`

Apply the replacement to all 3 instances. Do not change anything else. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.

   (Apply to both buttons.)

Do not change anything else in either file. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.
